title: Nonprobate Transfer
description: Assets that pass outside the probate estate — revocable trusts, TOD deeds, POD accounts, JTWROS, beneficiary designations, superannuation/CPF/EPF nominations.

id.description: Unique identifier for this nonprobate transfer within the INHERIT document.

transferType.$comment: revocable_trust: assets in a revocable (living) trust pass to beneficiaries outside probate. tod_deed: transfer-on-death deed — property transfers automatically on death (US states). pod_account: payable-on-death bank account. jtwros: joint tenancy with right of survivorship — deceased's share passes automatically to survivor(s). tenancy_by_entirety: US spousal joint tenancy — creditor-protected. beneficiary_designation: named beneficiary on a financial account. life_insurance_nomination: named beneficiary on a life insurance policy. superannuation_nomination: Australian superannuation death benefit nomination. cpf_nomination: Singapore Central Provident Fund nomination. epf_nomination: Malaysian Employees Provident Fund nomination. mandatory_savings_nomination: generic for other national provident fund nominations.
transferType.description: The mechanism by which this asset passes outside the probate estate.

designationType.description: More specific description of the transfer mechanism.

description.description: Free-text description of the nonprobate transfer.
examples: Joint bank account with spouse — passes by survivorship
Life insurance policy with Aviva — daughter named as sole beneficiary

trustId.description: Reference to a Trust.id if this transfer is via a revocable trust.

propertyId.description: Reference to a Property.id if this transfer relates to real estate (e.g. TOD deed, JTWROS property).

assetIds.description: References to Asset.id(s) that pass via this nonprobate transfer.

beneficiaryPersonIds.description: Person IDs of the primary beneficiaries or surviving owners who receive the asset.

contingentBeneficiaryPersonIds.description: Person IDs of contingent beneficiaries who receive if the primary beneficiaries predecease.

survivingOwnerPersonIds.description: Person IDs of surviving joint owners for JTWROS and tenancy by entirety transfers.

passesOutsideEstate.description: Confirmation that this asset passes outside the probate estate. Should always be true for nonprobate transfers.

bindingNomination.$comment: Whether the nomination is binding on the fund trustee. Australian super nominations may be binding or non-binding.
bindingNomination.description: Whether the beneficiary nomination is legally binding on the fund trustee. Australian superannuation nominations may be binding (valid for 3 years) or non-binding (trustee has discretion).

nominationExpiryDate.description: Date the nomination expires, if applicable. Australian binding nominations expire after 3 years and must be renewed.

recordingReference.description: Recording or filing reference for the transfer instrument (e.g. county recorder reference for a TOD deed).

notes.description: Free-text notes about this nonprobate transfer.
examples: Binding nomination renewed March 2024 — expires March 2027
TOD deed recorded in Los Angeles County
